description: Failure case: a magnetic-bead cleanup instruction that references a temperature module, magnetic module, waste reservoir, ethanol reservoir, tube rack, and PCR plate — none of which are in the config (which only has a tiprack, deep_well_plate, and p300). The constraint checker must flag MULTIPLE distinct violation types in a single result — verifies the checker accumulates violations across all 5 categories rather than short-circuiting on the first error.
